rules.rule_text:
rule SimplyTechSample
{
	meta:
		Description = "Adware.SimplyTech.vb"
		ThreatLevel = "5"

	strings:
		$ = "wtb_64.pdb" ascii wide
		$ = "wtb_64.DLL" ascii wide
		$ = "wtb.ToolbarInfo" ascii wide
		$ = "Surf Canyon" ascii wide
		$ = "surfcanyon" ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
